metadata.description: Official plugin marketplace for Xianix the-agent — AI-powered GitHub automation tools.

plugins.name: pr-helper
plugins.description: Assists with pull request workflows: summarises diffs, posts review comments, and labels PRs based on configurable rules.

plugins.name: pr-reviewer
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review plugin with specialized agents for code quality, security, test coverage, and performance analysis. Works with GitHub, Azure DevOps, Bitbucket, and any git repository.
